creator: bkoenig@alpha-tierchen.de
text:
Note that ports/122398 need to be committed first in order
	to deal with this PR.
	
	The patch below updates the port java/sablevm.
	Changes are:
	- add category 'devel'
	- add missing dependency on gettext and iconv
	- use pkg-config to determine the location of libffi headers
	- correct dependency check on sablevm-classpath
